en.extract:
Roll's partridge (Arborophila rolli) is a bird species in the family Phasianidae. It is found in highland forest in northern Sumatra, Indonesia. It is sometimes treated as a subspecies of the grey-breasted partridge.

'''Roll's partridge''' ('''''Arborophila rolli''''') is a bird species in the family [[Phasianidae]]. It is found in [[montane forest|highland forest]] in northern [[Sumatra]], [[Indonesia]]. It is sometimes treated as a [[subspecies]] of the [[grey-breasted partridge]].

zh.extract:
罗氏山鹧鸪（台湾作勞氏山鷓鴣）（学名：Arborophila rolli），是鸡形目雉科的一种鸟类。


特征
罗氏山鹧鸪体重约336克，翼长约140.4毫米，嘴峰长约23.5毫米，喙宽度约5.6毫米，喙厚度约8.4毫米，跗蹠长约43.5毫米，尾长约43.8毫米。罗氏山鹧鸪在其分布区内为留鸟，其栖息在密集的高大树木组成的森林中，食性为草食性。


分布
苏门答腊岛西北部的巴塔克地区。
